name: ImandraX
description: The automated reasoning engine: a prover for IML that decides verification goals, returns proofs or counterexamples (sat models), and computes region decompositions. It is the engine under IPL / Imandra Connectivity — decomposing a formalized FIX Rules-of-Engagement model into an exhaustive set of symbolic regions, one per certification case, from which a conformance suite is generated.
